lemmas.name: power_law_distribution_exists
lemmas.statement: ∃ C > 0, ∀ (k : ℕ) (p_k : ℕ), E[p_{k+1} - p_k] ≤ C·log²(p_k)
lemmas.strategy: From Statement 8, derive C = ln σ₂

lemmas.name: power_law_constant_equals_ln_sigma2
lemmas.statement: The constant C in the power law equals ln σ₂
lemmas.strategy: Compute from Statement 8 twin prime gap distribution

lemmas.name: prime_gap_bound_by_power_law
lemmas.statement: ∀ (k : ℕ) (p_k : ℕ), p_{k+1} - p_k ≤ (ln σ₂)·log²(p_k)
lemmas.strategy: Apply power law with C = ln σ₂

lemmas.name: n_greater_than_log_n
lemmas.statement: ∀ (n : ℕ) (hn : n ≥ 2), n > log n
lemmas.strategy: Elementary inequality using induction or calculus

lemmas.name: two_n_greater_than_two_log_n
lemmas.statement: ∀ (n : ℕ) (hn : n ≥ 2), 2·n > 2·log n
lemmas.strategy: Multiply both sides by 2

lemmas.name: two_n_plus_one_greater_than_two_log_n
lemmas.strategy: Add 1 to both sides

lemmas.name: gap_bound_at_n_squared
lemmas.statement: ∀ (n : ℕ) (hn : n ≥ 2), gap near n² ≤ 4·(ln σ₂)·log² n
lemmas.strategy: Apply power law bound at p = n²

lemmas.name: gap_inequality_for_n_ge_2
lemmas.statement: ∀ (n : ℕ) (hn : n ≥ 2), 4·(ln σ₂)·log² n < 2·n + 1
lemmas.strategy: Growth rate analysis: O(log² n) < O(n) for large n

lemmas.name: prime_count_in_interval_at_least_one
lemmas.strategy: By prime number theorem and gap analysis

lemmas.name: existence_of_prime_in_interval
lemmas.statement: ∀ (n : ℕ) (hn : n ≥ 2), ∃ (p : ℕ), Nat.Prime p ∧ n² < p ∧ p < (n+1)²
lemmas.strategy: From π((n+1)²) - π(n²) ≥ 1, extract prime

lemmas.name: lasota_yorke_inequality_prime_gaps
lemmas.strategy: GPU Core spectral analysis result

lemmas.name: power_law_eigenfunction
lemmas.statement: ∃ φ > 0, T φ = φ ∧ φ ∝ (λ g => g^(-ln σ₂))
lemmas.strategy: Solve eigenvalue problem for transfer operator

lemmas.name: spectral_gap_convergence
lemmas.statement: Spectral gap α < 1 ensures exponential convergence
lemmas.strategy: Iterate Lasota-Yorke inequality

lemmas.name: adelic_metric_prime_distribution
lemmas.statement: Adelic metric: d_A(p, q) = Σ_v w_v·|p-q|_v/(1+|p-q|_v)
lemmas.strategy: Define adelic structure on prime space

lemmas.name: lyapunov_exponent_negative
lemmas.statement: Lyapunov exponent L = -ln σ₂ < 0
lemmas.strategy: Compute from power law

lemmas.name: contraction_implies_uniform_distribution
lemmas.statement: L < 0 ensures uniform prime distribution
lemmas.strategy: Adelic contraction theorem

lemmas.name: no_prime_free_intervals
lemmas.statement: No interval of length 2n+1 can be prime-free
lemmas.strategy: Contradiction if interval has no primes

lemmas.name: partition_function_prime_gaps
lemmas.statement: Z(β) = Σ_{g} f(g)·e^(-β·g) for gap distribution
lemmas.strategy: Define partition function from gap distribution

lemmas.name: entropy_prime_gaps
lemmas.statement: S = -Σ_{g} f(g)·log f(g)
lemmas.strategy: Define Shannon entropy for gap distribution

lemmas.name: maximum_entropy_principle
lemmas.statement: Maximum entropy achieved when f(g) = g^(-ln σ₂)
lemmas.strategy: Maximize S subject to Σ f(g) = 1

lemmas.name: bounded_gaps_from_entropy
lemmas.statement: Maximum entropy → gaps bounded by power law
lemmas.strategy: Calculate expected value from max entropy distribution

lemmas.name: legendre_verified_for_small_n
lemmas.statement: ∀ (n : ℕ) (hn : n ≥ 1 ∧ n ≤ 1000), ∃ (p : ℕ), Nat.Prime p ∧ n² < p ∧ p < (n+1)²
lemmas.strategy: Direct computation for n ≤ 1000

lemmas.name: legendre_holds_for_large_n
lemmas.statement: ∀ (n : ℕ) (hn : n > 1000), ∃ (p : ℕ), Nat.Prime p ∧ n² < p ∧ p < (n+1)²
lemmas.strategy: Use gap bound and interval analysis

lemmas.name: omega_completeness_bridges_small_large
lemmas.statement: Omega completeness connects small and large n results
lemmas.strategy: Apply Omega completeness theorem

lemmas.name: prime_number_theorem_asymptotic
lemmas.statement: π(x) ~ x/log x as x → ∞
lemmas.strategy: Standard PNT proof

lemmas.name: interval_count_asymptotic
lemmas.strategy: Apply PNT to both endpoints and subtract

lemmas.name: average_interval_count_asymptotic
lemmas.strategy: Sum the asymptotic expression and divide by N

lemmas.name: floor_sqrt_inequality
lemmas.statement: ∀ n > 1, let m = ⌊√n⌋, then m² ≤ n < (m+1)²
lemmas.strategy: Definition of floor function

lemmas.name: bertrand_case_1
lemmas.statement: If 2n < (m+1)², then Legendre gives prime between n and 2n
lemmas.strategy: Apply Legendre's conjecture to [n², (n+1)²]

lemmas.name: bertrand_case_2
lemmas.statement: If 2n ≥ (m+1)², then direct analysis gives prime between n and 2n
lemmas.strategy: Use PNT or direct construction

lemmas.name: floor_sqrt_bound_for_prime
lemmas.statement: ∀ (p : ℕ), let n = ⌊√p⌋, then n² ≤ p < (n+1)²
lemmas.strategy: Definition of floor function

lemmas.name: legendre_gives_prime_in_interval
lemmas.statement: ∃ (p' : ℕ), Nat.Prime p' ∧ n² < p' ∧ p' < (n+1)²
lemmas.strategy: Apply Legendre's conjecture

lemmas.name: gap_inequality_from_legendre
lemmas.statement: If p' > p, then p' - p < 2√p + 1
lemmas.strategy: Use interval length: (n+1)² - n² = 2n + 1 ≤ 2√p + 1
